meta.title: Understanding Scrap Copper Prices in Riyadh (2026)
meta.description: Discover how scrap copper is graded, what factors drive its price in Riyadh, and tips to maximize your cash payout when selling copper cables.

sections.content: Copper is often referred to as the king of scrap metals due to its excellent electrical conductivity, infinite recyclability, and high market value. In Riyadh, the demand for recycled copper remains strong, driven by construction developments, grid upgrades, and global recycling demands.
To get the best price for your scrap copper, it is essential to understand the grades scrap buyers look for:

items: **Millberry / Bright Bare Copper:** The highest-grade copper. It consists of clean, unalloyed, uncoated, and bare copper wire thicker than 1.6mm. It must be free of insulation and paint.
**Copper No. 1:** Clean copper pipes, tubing, and heavy busbars. Minimal oxidation and no solder joints are permitted.
**Copper No. 2:** Copper wire or pipes that have paint, solder, tin coating, or slight corrosion. This also includes burnt copper wire.
**Insulated Copper Wire:** Cables that still have their plastic casing. Pricing depends on copper recovery (usually 45% to 80% copper inside).

sections.content: Tip: Stripping the insulation off thick copper power cables before selling can increase your payout by up to 30%, as you avoid processing fee deductions.
What Influences Copper Prices in Riyadh?

Local copper scrap prices are determined by the London Metal Exchange (LME) global index, local supply and demand in the Riyadh industrial areas (like Al Sullay), and exchange rates. Purity and weight are the main factors when our team evaluates your scrap copper on-site.

meta.title: How to Safely Sell Old Air Conditioners for Cash
meta.description: Learn the step-by-step guide to selling old split and central air conditioners in Riyadh, including why professional dismantling is essential.

how-to-safely-sell-old-air-conditioners-.heroTitle: How to Safely Sell [Old Air Conditioners] for Cash
how-to-safely-sell-old-air-conditioners-.author: Riyadh Scrap Buyer Team

sections.content: Riyadh's hot climate means that air conditioning units are vital. However, over time, AC units lose efficiency, break down, or become obsolete. Replacing them leaves you with heavy metal scrap that can be sold for excellent cash returns.
Why Scrap AC Units Are Valuable
Air conditioners are packed with valuable materials. Even if the unit is completely non-functional, it contains:

items: **Copper Tubing & Windings:** Found in the condenser coils and compressor motor.
**Aluminum Fins:** Wrapped around the copper tubes in the radiator grids.
**Heavy Steel Casing:** The outer cabinet is heavy-gauge galvanized steel.

sections.content: Warning: Air conditioning units contain refrigerants (Freon gas). Releasing these gases into the air is illegal and harmful. Always use a licensed scrap buyer who can dismantle and reclaim the gas safely.
Step-by-Step Guide to Selling Your AC Scrap

First, take clear photos of the units (especially labels showing capacity). Second, call or WhatsApp our team for an estimate. Third, schedule a time for our crew to visit. We will safely disconnect the wiring, recover refrigerant, dismantle the heavy units from wall brackets, load them, and pay you cash on the spot.

meta.title: The Benefits of Metal Recycling for Riyadh's Environment
meta.description: Explore how local scrap recycling reduces landfills, saves energy, and aligns with Saudi Vision 2030 circular economy goals in Riyadh.

the-benefits-of-metal-recycling-for-riya.heroTitle: The Benefits of [Metal Recycling] for Riyadh
the-benefits-of-metal-recycling-for-riya.author: Riyadh Scrap Buyer Team

sections.content: As Riyadh grows rapidly, waste management becomes a critical priority. Metal recycling plays a pivotal role in establishing a circular economy, conserving natural resources, and reducing environmental degradation in Saudi Arabia.
Environmental Advantages of Scrap Metal Recycling
Recycling metals like copper, steel, and aluminum has a direct positive impact on our local environment:

items: **Energy Savings:** Recycling aluminum uses 95% less energy than producing it from raw bauxite. Recycling copper saves 85% of the energy needed for mining.
**Landfill Reduction:** Scrap metal is extremely heavy and dense. By recycling old machinery and AC units, we prevent massive amounts of metal from filling up Riyadh's municipal landfills.
**Lower Carbon Footprint:** Manufacturing items from recycled scrap reduces industrial greenhouse gas emissions dramatically.

sections.content: Saudi Vision 2030: Riyadh is targeting a high rate of landfill diversion and circular recycling. By selling your residential or industrial scrap, you directly contribute to these environmental and national goals.

Instead of leaving scrap copper cables, old steel shelves, or broken appliances to rust in your yard, contact a professional buyer. We provide free pickup, sort the metals, and route them to local industrial processing yards where they are melted down and forged into brand new materials.

meta.title: Privacy Policy | Riyadh Scrap Buyer
meta.description: Privacy Policy for Riyadh Scrap Buyer. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your information when using our scrap buying services.

content.intro: At Riyadh Scrap Buyer, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy outlines how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our scrap pickup services in Riyadh.

sections.title: 1. Information We Collect
sections.text: We collect information you provide directly to us, including your name, phone number, email address, physical location or neighborhood, and details (including photographs) of the scrap materials you wish to sell.

sections.title: 2. How We Use Your Information
sections.text: We use the collected information to respond to your inquiries, provide weight-based quotes, coordinate pickup schedules, complete cash transactions, and improve our customer service.

sections.title: 3. Information Sharing & Security
sections.text: We do not sell or lease your personal information to third parties. We implement secure data storage systems to prevent unauthorized access or disclosure of your contact and transaction details.

sections.title: 4. Cookies
sections.text: Our website uses basic cookies to enhance user experience, track language preferences (English/Arabic), and monitor website performance traffic.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights & Contact
sections.text: You have the right to request access to or deletion of your personal contact details from our records. For any questions, contact us via email at privacy@riyadhscrapbuyer.com or WhatsApp.

meta.title: Terms of Service | Riyadh Scrap Buyer
meta.description: Terms and Conditions of service for Riyadh Scrap Buyer. Understand pricing, dismantling, and pickup terms in Riyadh.

content.intro: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before utilizing our scrap purchasing, dismantling, and collection services. By requesting a pickup or submitting details, you agree to comply with these terms.

sections.title: 1. Ownership of Scrap Materials
sections.text: By selling scrap materials to Riyadh Scrap Buyer, you warrant that you are the legal owner of the items or have explicit written authority from the owner to sell them. We do not purchase materials of questionable or illegal origin.

sections.title: 2. Pricing and Weight Evaluation
sections.text: All prices quoted are estimates until our team conducts an on-site inspection and weight measurement using certified scales. Prices are based on current market rates and material grading (purity).

sections.title: 3. Dismantling & Site Access
sections.text: You agree to provide our crew safe access to the premises where the scrap is located. Our team handles dismantling (e.g. AC units, heavy machinery) with professional care, but you must ensure that utility lines (electricity, gas, water) are safely disconnected beforehand.

sections.title: 4. Payment Terms
sections.text: Payment is made in cash immediately upon completion of loading and weighing at the site, unless a different payment structure is explicitly agreed upon in writing for bulk commercial accounts.

sections.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
sections.text: Riyadh Scrap Buyer is not liable for pre-existing structural damage at the collection site or damages resulting from utility disconnect failures by the property owner.

shared.ctaSubtext: Contact us now for a free evaluation and instant cash payment in Riyadh.
